title: cestrum newellii
intro: Cestrum newellii, also known as the Night Bell or Yellow Trumpet, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cestrum newellii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections. Cestrum newellii can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it as a treatment.
